channel.title: about on Philipp Schmalen
channel.description: Recent content in about on Philipp Schmalen

item.title: About
item.description: Thanks for dropping by. If you like to get in touch, I would love to hear from you and am excited to read your message. I appreciate your taking the time to just say hi or give feedback of any kind. Here is a selection of previously completed projects: Built a job recommender systems for the Danish workforce (1.8 million) based on alternating least squares, KNN and a hybrid recommender combining KNN and demographic information in R
